nasb.text: But if you are going to say, “We will not stay in this land,” so as not to listen to the voice of the Lord your God,

esv.text: But if you say, ‘We will not remain in this land,’ disobeying the voice of the Lord your God

cnv.text: 但是，你們若說：‘我們不住在這地’，不聽從耶和華你們的　神的話，

ccb.text: 然而，如果你们不听你们的上帝耶和华的话，不留在这地方，
